vBRIEFInfo.description: Refresh project concept and architecture documentation to match the implemented Deft Directive system.

plan.title: docs: refresh project concepts and architecture

narratives.Description: The current project concept and architecture documents still describe an older four-component, run-centric Deft Directive shape. The implementation has evolved into a Taskfile-first framework with Python automation, vBRIEF lifecycle metadata, installer/doctor handoff, triage/cache/scope workflows, content packs, release/PR automation, and codebase-structure projection contracts.
narratives.Origin: Operator request after reviewing directive/AGENTS.md and comparing current documentation against implemented project behavior.
narratives.Acceptance: PROJECT-DEFINITION and specification vBRIEF narratives are updated to describe the current architecture. Generated SPECIFICATION.md is rendered from the updated source. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/CONCEPTS.md, docs/FILES.md, commands.md, README.md, and codebase architecture docs are reconciled with implemented paths and task surfaces. Stale planning architecture docs are marked historical. A brief CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry is added. Validation passes.
narratives.NonGoals: No behavior changes, no new codebase MAP generator, no schema migration, and no changes to installer or task implementations.

items.title: Update project-definition and specification vBRIEF narratives
Render SPECIFICATION.md from the updated specification vBRIEF
Refresh architecture, concept, command, file-map, README, and codebase docs
Mark stale planning architecture docs as historical or deprecated
Add a concise CHANGELOG entry and run validation

references.title: Direct user request: refresh project concepts and architecture docs
